title: DOC — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Correction (DOC) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the DOC Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/doc, and the legacy Inmate Lookup Service / 'P.I.C. Lookup' (a073-ils-web.nyc.gov). Includes the NYC geography spine, DOC facility references, and the shared person-in-custody demographic dimensions.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across DOC facility records — the join keys back to the rest of city government. Note most DOC jails sit on Rikers Island (Bronx).

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code.

FacilityReference.description: A reference to a DOC facility (jail) by its operational code and name. Facility codes appear as the 'FACILITY' dimension across DOC incident and lock-in datasets (e.g. AMKC, GRVC, RNDC, RMSC, OBCC, VCBC, EMTC, WF, NIC, MDC).

facilityName.description: Full facility name (e.g. 'Anna M. Kross Center', 'George R. Vierno Center').

Demographics.description: Person-in-custody demographic dimensions shared across the custody and incident datasets ('AGE', 'RACE', 'GENDER').

IncidentType.description: DOC incident categories, unified across the parallel incident datasets.
